sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77183" key="panagreu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παν-αγρεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n77183.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who catches everything</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παναγρέος έλπίδα Μοίρης</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.609</biblScope> </bibl> (Id.); <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φυλάκων . . παναγρέακανθόν</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.218</biblScope> </bibl> (Id.).</sense> </entryFree>
